mechanism_summary: Naive's higher throughput (no I2S overhead) and stochastic 4-byte arithmetic mutation stumble onto the internal overflow sentinel 0x7fffffff; I2S cannot substitute this value because it has no input-byte pre-image to copy from.
one_line: Havoc arithmetic hits overflow sentinel that I2S cannot pre-image

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance buckets reward inputs whose redy field is bitwise closer to 0x7fffffff, letting the corpus accumulate near-misses that arithmetic mutation then walks to the exact sentinel value.
one_line: VP gradient walks redy byte-by-byte toward PNG_FIXED_ERROR sentinel

mechanism_summary: Naive's unconstrained byte-insert/copy havoc readily grows inputs to multi-glyph syllable length; I2S substitutions pin bytes to intercepted CMP operands rather than lengthening the input, so cmplog never reaches start+3<=end.
one_line: I2S pins bytes to CMP operands instead of growing syllable length

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient gives partial-credit for inputs approaching the comparison/length states gating the >=3-glyph syllable condition, retaining near-misses that I2S-only cmplog discards for having only all-or-nothing edge feedback.
one_line: VP gradient retains near-miss inputs toward 3-glyph syllable length threshold

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutions overwrite the Halant-category bytes with logged CMP operands, displacing the carefully-positioned H glyph that naive's plain havoc mutation assembles; the comparison-solving technique actively disrupts the structural glyph sequence needed.
one_line: I2S overwrites Halant category bytes with CMP operands, disrupting H-after-base sequence

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance buckets give partial credit for inputs moving toward the H-category comparison at line 678, letting vpc retain near-miss inputs and climb to the true side where I2S-only edge feedback stalls.
one_line: VP gradient retains near-misses toward Halant category equality that I2S-only stalls at

mechanism_summary: syllable_type is an internal nibble classification, not an input-side CMP operand, so I2S substitution wastes energy on irrelevant comparisons while naive's full havoc budget is spent on category-byte exploration that reaches the indic_symbol_cluster arm.
one_line: Internal category dispatch; I2S wastes budget on irrelevant CMP operands

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient adds Hamming-distance feedback on category-relevant comparison operands on top of cmplog, giving vpc a signal that rewards partial progress toward indic_symbol_cluster where I2S-only edge feedback provides none.
one_line: VP gradient adds partial-progress signal toward category dispatch that I2S-only lacks

mechanism_summary: VPre is a category-table classification with no literal input-side CMP operand; naive's unencumbered havoc iteration over periodic 4-byte records produces VPre glyphs freely, while I2S overhead and misdirection make cmplog net-negative.
one_line: Category-table VPre lookup; I2S overhead and misdirection block naive's productive record mutation

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient retains intermediate inputs approaching the VPre-producing record layout as new-coverage candidates, giving vpc a climbing signal toward the category check that cmplog's all-or-nothing edge feedback discards.
one_line: VP gradient retains VPre-approaching record layouts that I2S-only edge feedback discards

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutions lock operand bytes to logged CMP values that decode to non-VPre categories, preventing POS_PRE_M assignment and keeping the line-280 true side unreachable; naive's unconstrained havoc drifts into the VPre-bearing category without that constraint.
one_line: I2S locks bytes to non-VPre CMP values, blocking POS_PRE_M assignment

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards incremental Hamming progress toward the multi-byte category values that decode to a VPre glyph, letting vpc cross the gate that cmplog stalls on without gradient feedback.
one_line: VP gradient climbs category-byte values toward VPre POS_PRE_M equality

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace continually overwrites intact script/language tag substrings with CMP-buffer operands, displacing the readable bytes that build the ZWNJ-plus-following-glyph structure; naive's havoc keeps those tag bytes intact and wins.
one_line: I2S overwrites intact tag bytes, destroying structural ZWNJ sequence naive preserves

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient buckets reward partial progress toward byte patterns selecting ZWNJ plus following non-ignorable glyph categories, letting vpc accrete the needed structure incrementally where plain cmplog gets no partial-credit signal.
one_line: VP gradient accretes ZWNJ-structure bytes where cmplog gets no partial credit

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutions target non-existent exact-match CMPs on a category-table range dispatch, polluting the corpus and starving the broad havoc churn that actually reaches the numeral-cluster case 14 transition.
one_line: I2S off-target on category dispatch; corpus pollution starves havoc reaching case 14

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient gives partial-progress feedback over state-machine trans-key comparison values (range lookups at lines 966-967), retaining near-miss category runs and converging on the numeral-cluster case 14 transition that plain cmplog discards.
one_line: VP gradient retains near-miss category runs converging on numeral-cluster case 14

mechanism_summary: I2S drags corpus toward literal CMP targets, away from the self-similar repeated-record layout that USE(R) category needs; naive keeps doing plain havoc on the record skeleton and reliably produces USE(R)-led multi-glyph syllables.
one_line: I2S destroys repeated-record skeleton; havoc preserves it, producing USE(R) syllables

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix gradient rewards inputs that progressively approach the use_category==USE(R) comparison, guiding corpus growth onto the glyph-category gate that plain cmplog cannot sense without gradient feedback.
one_line: VP gradient senses partial use_category proximity toward USE(R) equality

mechanism_summary: Halant glyph-category gate needs structural glyph-category state built by broad byte mutation; I2S spends budget on logged-CMP substitutions that do not build that state, misallocating energy while naive's havoc reaches it readily.
one_line: Havoc builds structural halant-glyph state; I2S misallocated on unrelated CMPs

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient gives Hamming/prefix-distance credit for inputs approaching the structural glyph-category state needed for halant detection, keeping near-miss seeds where plain cmplog discards them for lack of graded signal.
one_line: VP gradient retains near-miss seeds approaching halant glyph-category state

mechanism_summary: Naive plain havoc navigates structured font tables to reach MALAYALAM script and 0x0D12 codepoint without CMP-substitution overhead; I2S misdirects mutation budget and never advances toward this two-stage script-then-codepoint dispatch.
one_line: Havoc reaches MALAYALAM case 0x0D12; I2S misdirects budget on multi-stage dispatch

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient gives graded feedback toward the codepoint==0x0D12 comparison in the MALAYALAM arm, which cmplog's edge-bucket-only feedback cannot provide, enabling vpc to climb toward the exact match.
one_line: VP gradient gives graded feedback toward exact 0x0D12 codepoint in MALAYALAM arm
